mapper.select: SELECT '不及格' as kaoshichengji,case when t.不及格 is null then 0 else t.不及格 end total from (select sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 0 and kaoshichengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 60 and kaoshichengji <= 79 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 80 and kaoshichengji <= 89 then 1 else 0 end) as 良, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 90 and kaoshichengji <= 100 then 1 else 0 end) as 优 from xueshengchengji 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '及格' as kaoshichengji,case when t.及格 is null then 0 else t.及格 end total from (select sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 0 and kaoshichengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 60 and kaoshichengji <= 79 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 80 and kaoshichengji <= 89 then 1 else 0 end) as 良, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 90 and kaoshichengji <= 100 then 1 else 0 end) as 优 from xueshengchengji 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '良' as kaoshichengji,case when t.良 is null then 0 else t.良 end total from (select sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 0 and kaoshichengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 60 and kaoshichengji <= 79 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 80 and kaoshichengji <= 89 then 1 else 0 end) as 良, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 90 and kaoshichengji <= 100 then 1 else 0 end) as 优 from xueshengchengji 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t union all SELECT '优' as kaoshichengji,case when t.优 is null then 0 else t.优 end total from (select sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 0 and kaoshichengji <= 59 then 1 else 0 end) as 不及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 60 and kaoshichengji <= 79 then 1 else 0 end) as 及格, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 80 and kaoshichengji <= 89 then 1 else 0 end) as 良, sum(case when kaoshichengji >= 90 and kaoshichengji <= 100 then 1 else 0 end) as 优 from xueshengchengji 1=1 ${ew.sqlSegment} ) t
